text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe has been plagued by a number
of paranormal phenomena, but thanks to an
intensive treatment plan, she manages to pass her
health check.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
My weight... is still fluctuating dramatically... but
my performance has started to stabilize.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
This is all thanks to you, Trainer... Although, I'm
still some way from achieving my goal.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Why am I thinking about my goal when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to imagine how her sentence was going to
end, but I can't tell what she's thinking.
choice_data_list: Why don't we decide on our next goal?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Results-wise, winning the spring Classics might be
too much of a challenge. But at the same time, I
don't want us to limit our own potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to ask Manhattan Cafe's opinion first.
That way, I'll know how she truly feels.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I don't... want to admit this. I really don't...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But I know what I have to do... My friend pointed
at her, so... so...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I have to enter the Yayoi Sho.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: The Yayoi Sho, the race Tachyon is entering.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's not... that I want this myself. It's that my friend
is telling me to do this.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: She said to run. And that if I don't...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I... don't know what will happen. That's all she
said...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's made her mind up. Looking at
this as a trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Doing well in the Yayoi Sho would set us up for
the G1. Which means...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Okay! Tachyon is a handful... but she's an
incredible racer.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She's up there with the best... But given the
progress I've made, I think... I might... like to take
her on at the Yayoi Sho.
